summary: Push Notifications feature testing completed successfully. Backend API fully functional with 22/22 tests passing. Frontend NotificationSettings component renders correctly with PRO badge, all toggle switches work, and test notification button calls the API. Push notification delivery is MOCKED (no FCM/APNs keys configured) - notifications are logged to console instead of being sent to actual devices.
passed_tests: Config has notification_types list with expected types
Notification types have proper structure (id, name, description)
New user gets default preferences (push_enabled=true, etc.)
Test notification response has proper structure
Test notification handles no registered devices correctly
Pro user has high_confidence_alerts enabled by default
Signal generation triggers notification for high-confidence signals
All expected notification types are defined
Frontend: NotificationSettings component renders with PRO badge
Frontend: Enable Push Notifications toggle works
Frontend: High-Confidence Signal Alerts toggle works
Frontend: All Signal Alerts toggle visible
Frontend: Send Test Notification button calls API
critical_code_review_comments: PushNotificationService (push_notifications.py) correctly implements notification delivery with user preference checking
HIGH_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD is set to 75% as specified
notify_pro_users_high_confidence_signal() correctly filters Pro/Elite users and sends notifications
Signal generation in server.py correctly triggers push notifications for 75%+ confidence signals
NotificationPreferencesUpdate model supports all required fields including quiet_hours
Frontend NotificationSettings component correctly fetches and updates preferences via API
All toggle switches have proper data-testid attributes for testing
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_push_notifications.py - Created comprehensive push notification tests (22 tests)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI components render correctly, toggles work, API integration verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Push notifications feature is fully implemented. Backend sends notifications when high-confidence (75%+) signals are generated. Frontend has NotificationSettings component in dashboard with toggles for push_enabled, high_confidence_alerts, signal_alerts, trade_confirmations, price_alerts, and quiet_hours. Push notification delivery is MOCKED (logged to console) since no FCM/APNs/Expo keys are configured. Test user 0xTEST_PUSH_NOTIFICATIONS_PRO has Pro status for testing.
